/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/rk_mp4_yolo_stage4.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_mp4_yolo_stage4.dir/src/decoder_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_mp4_yolo_stage4.dir/src/rknn_input_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_mp4_yolo_stage4.dir/src/preprocess_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_mp4_yolo_stage4.dir/src/inference_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_mp4_yolo_stage4.dir/src/postprocess_osd_thread.cpp.o -o rk_mp4_yolo_stage4  -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -lrockchip_mpp -lrga -lrknn_api -lpthread -ldl
